title: geum aleppicum
intro: Geum aleppicum, also known as the yellow avens or orange avens, is a perennial plant native to eastern North America, belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, exhibiting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Geum aleppicum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Geum aleppicum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in salves and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
